profile_backing.source: fallback target after br ready --json returned no ready perf beads
profile_backing.profile_signal: Previous RFFT Bluestein prefix rejection routed to real-input half-spectrum Bluestein. This benchmark exposed output-count fanout gating at 64 * 750 = 48000 even though Bluestein padded work is 64 * 4096 = 262144.

lever.description: Gate RFFT row fanout on transform work length rather than emitted half-spectrum length, and keep non-power-of-two row blocks even so packed adjacent-row Bluestein pairing is unchanged.

benchmark.command_baseline: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf29-baseline-713aea88 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- rfft_batch_64x1499_bluestein_f64 --sample-size 100
benchmark.command_after: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf29-after-work-threshold-evenrows cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- rfft_batch_64x1499_bluestein_f64 --sample-size 100

score.reason: Same-worker RCH Criterion improvement is 1.39x median and 1.30x conservative with non-overlapping intervals; behavior proof pins output and scheduling equivalence.

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Output row order is unchanged. Parallel workers still receive contiguous row blocks and write disjoint contiguous output slices. For non-power-of-two RFFT, row block size is rounded up to an even count so adjacent-row packed Bluestein pairings remain identical to the serial full-row block, except for the same final odd tail case.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Per-row transform arithmetic and packed-row unpack formulas are unchanged. The only changed decision is whether independent row blocks run concurrently after the work threshold. Even row-block splitting preserves packed pair membership, so floating-point association for every row is unchanged relative to the serial packed row block.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No comparisons, tie-breaking, sorting, or priority decisions are introduced or changed.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No random inputs, seeds, or RNG state are used by this FFT/RFFT path.

rch_tests.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib fft -- --nocapture
rch_tests.summary: 41 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored, 1124 filtered; includes threaded Bluestein RFFT SHA-256 golden, canonical FFT golden digest, half-length RFFT golden digest, and threaded batch parity tests.

rch_check.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets

rch_clippy.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings
rch_clippy.details: Passed after rebasing over origin/main linalg clippy cleanup.

ubs.details: Changed-file scan exits 1 on longstanding fft.rs panic/indexing/test-assert inventories linked to the baseline blob; no unsafe code was introduced.
